description:
Follow up the `sbdpi-wx1.3` reviewer nit: `DashboardComponent.applySnapshot()` updates `workerSummary` but does not refresh `model.workers`, so an already-open `/bw` dashboard can keep stale worker rows after refresh.

Scope:
- make dashboard snapshot application refresh the worker row source, not just summary counts
- ensure Workers tab reflects newly refreshed worker runtime data while the overlay stays open
- add regression coverage for in-overlay refresh behavior so worker rows and summary stay in sync

Primary lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/dashboard.ts`
- related dashboard/worker-manager tests

Acceptance criteria:
- refreshing the dashboard updates both worker summary badges and rendered worker rows
- landing/cleanup/review state changes appear in the Workers tab without reopening the overlay
- regression tests cover snapshot refresh with changed worker data

Parallel-safety note:
- keep this ticket tightly scoped to dashboard snapshot/update wiring and tests; avoid unrelated worker-manager feature work.
title: Fix stale worker rows after dashboard refresh in the Workers tab
